verses.text: 'Blessed is every one that feareth the LORD' and walks in His ways; he shall eat the fruit of his labour, his wife a fruitful vine and his children like olive plants. The God-fearing home is blessed. Reverence for God brings sweetness to work and family alike.

'Blessed is every one that feareth the LORD' and walks in His ways; he shall eat the fruit of his labour, his wife a fruitful vine and his children like olive plants. The God-fearing home is blessed. Reverence for God brings sweetness to work and family alike.

'Blessed is every one that feareth the LORD' and walks in His ways; he shall eat the fruit of his labour, his wife a fruitful vine and his children like olive plants. The God-fearing home is blessed. Reverence for God brings sweetness to work and family alike.

Thus is the man blessed who fears the LORD; he shall see Jerusalem's good and his children's children, with peace upon Israel. Blessing reaches across generations. The fear of God enriches not only a life but a lineage.
